description.unified: Deals damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [3 sec->2sec].

Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15sec, dealing Magic DoT every second and [reducing Magic Defense by 10%->reducing Magic Defense by 10%]. Enemies with [Mark of Death] [(removed) take 25% increased Magic Damage], and if recast within 15sec, the [effect->Magic Defense reduction] is increased by [20%->50%], [stacking up to 5times->stacking up to 5times]. This [increase->increase] effect cannot be dispelled.

Deals Magic Damage every second to all enemies for [12 sec->14 sec], and recovers HP equal to [130%->75%] of damage dealt. During the duration, all allies take [20%->10%] reduced Physical Damage, and enemies [with->affected by] [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage. [(removed) has a 10% chance to stun them for 0.6 sec.]

Increases all allies’ Physical Defense. When taking damage that would be fatal, enters [Coffin] state for 5sec, restoring Attack Power + [6%->10%] of Max HP. [Coffin]:Attack Speed changes do not affect the target. The target is immune to all damage and deals Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every 1sec.

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1000->2000], but pulls the target [to your vicinity with a 100% success rate->toward you].
All allies additionally take 10% less Physical DMG.
When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for [1.2 sec->1 sec].

description.unified: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by [400->320] and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.

dark.unified: On hit, Attack and Healing increase by 1%. This effect stacks up to [50 times->35 times].

description.unified: Deals Magic Damage per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to [75%->100%] of damage dealt. [(removed) The 4 allies with the highest Attack (excluding yourself) deal {2}% increased damage to non-hero enemies. This effect cannot be dispelled.]
